title: Simple CivMC
description: Basic modpack for CivMC, will try to keep updated. @asgeir on discord
body:
**THIS MODPACK IS ONLY MADE FOR PLAY.CIVMC.NET, NOT RECOMMENDED FOR GENERAL USE**

**Not an OFFICIAL pack for the Server**

I take no credit for any of the individual mods, all credit to their respective developers/creators.

This modpack is simply a compilation of the most common and popular mods used on the CivMC server. As we who play the server know, the rules regarding which mods are legal etc are rather strict. I have checked this modpack's contents with Admin RedDevel and he said it looks fine - thus, no mods here will get you banned from the server, as long as you follow rules regarding how certain ones are used.

This pack covers the most commonly useful mods for CivMC such as; CivModern (including combat radar), xaeroe's minmap and worldmap, and litematica + many more!

Why should you use it?
- Useful CivMC mods
- Admin checked it for rule stuff
- You don't have to make your own pack or instance for the server
- I will try to keep it up to date when the admins update the server, so you guys can just click "update" in modrinth etc

Primary mods included in the latest release:
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity/version/3.0.0-beta.5+1.21) 
- [Xaeros Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap/version/24.5.0_Fabric_1.21) - **Disable CaveMode as standard, follow ALL CivMC server rules regarding mods**
- [Xaeros Worldmap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map/version/1.39.0_Fabric_1.21)
- [Snitch Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/snitch-mod/version/1.4.4-mc1.21.1) - [(Thanks Gjum)](https://github.com/gjum)
- [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby/version/5.2.4+mc1.21)
- [ReplayMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod/version/1.21-2.6.20)
- [~~Advanced Chat, and its addons~~](https://modrinth.com/mod/advanced-chat/version/1.6-1.21) - Could not find a working 1.21.1 version.
- [No Fog](https://modrinth.com/mod/no_fog/version/1.3.6+1.16.5-1.21)
- [Model Gap FIx](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix/version/1.21-1.6)
- [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica/version/0.19.50)
- [Litematica Printer](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica-printer/version/3.2.1+1.21) - **Follow ALL CivMC server rules regarding mods**
- [BetterHurtCam](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterhurtcam/version/1.9.1+mc1.21)
- [CivModern](https://modrinth.com/mod/civmodern/version/1.6.5) - [(Thanks Okx)](https://github.com/okx)
- InventoryHud+
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu/version/11.0.3)
- [Wavey Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/wavey-capes/version/1.4.10)
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling/version/1.7.0)
- And a bunch of misc mods that help performance and mods function
- [JsMacro (self modified)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jsmacros) - This version was modified by me to work with 1.21.1. It is the public 1.21 version but i altered line 35 to say 1.21.1 instead of 1.21, this allows it to launch properly. This hotfix was suggested by the jsmacro discord. [https://imgur.com/a/4fcFO3K](https://imgur.com/a/4fcFO3K). JsMacro is available to you under the terms of the MPL-license. 

Will attempt to get AdvancedChat for civ working etc
